title: Dream City
content:
A dream come true for all kids!

Do you have a dream job? Would you like to try different jobs? Dream City is an indoor theme park for kids. You can role-play different jobs and learn useful skills. You can also earn DC money and spend it at our gift shop.

Top 3 attractions

Do you enjoy taking photos? At our studio, you can be a photographer. Pick up some tips on how to use the camera there. Take some photos, make your own photo book and take it home.

Have you ever dreamt of working on a plane? Visit our full-size model plane. Put on the smart uniform and be a flight attendant or pilot. Let's fly high!

Are you good at sport? Come to our stadium. We can train you to become an athlete.

What our visitors said

Sophie: I want to be a chef when I grow up. I made a pizza in DC Restaurant. It was a really wonderful experience!

Millie: I'm weak in singing. I don't think I'll be a singer, but being a singer at DC Theatre was fun. I had the chance to dress up, use a mic and sing on stage. Do I look like a pop star?

Charlie: I'm good at acting. Maybe I can be an actor. At DC Theatre, I performed a short play with other kids on stage. It was a lot of fun! I also role-played a lawyer in their court because lawyers also need to speak in front of people. Acting as a lawyer was so amazing!

Ron: I'd like to be an athlete. At DC Stadium, I played the role of a world-famous football player. I held a model of the World Cup trophy and took a great photo. Hurray!

Plan your visit to Dream City at once. Your dream can come true here!
